original_image_tags: scan of a single, yellowish, aged paper page, likely the reverse side of a document or a folder cover sheet. The page shows significant bleed-through of faint, mirrored text from the other side. At the bottom, there are three prominent, dark blue stamped impressions. The top edge of the page has two hole-punch marks and a torn corner.

elements.description: Bottom of page contains multiple ink stamps. Visible text includes 'FBI', 'RECEIVED-DIRECTOR', 'FEB 21 4 00 PM '56', 'FBI MAIL ROOM', 'FEB 21 5 59 PM '56', 'REC'D ESPIONAGE', 'FBI', 'U S DEPT OF JUSTICE', and 'FEB 23 1 46 PM '56'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content (aged paper page with stamps at the bottom), but B provides specific verbatim text from the stamps that A only describes generically as 'dark blue stamped impressions' without contradiction.
